top_signals.title: Ghana Seeks 30% of Large Gold Mines’ Output For Local Refineries
top_signals.summary: Ghana wants large-scale gold mines to sell at least 30% of their annual output to the central bank to increase local refining and boost the country’s foreign-exchange reserves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
